apiSettings.title: API Settings
apiSettings.apiKeyStorageInfo: Your API key is stored locally in your browser's IndexedDB and is not sent to any server.
apiSettings.configureApiSettings: Configure your Google Generative Language API settings
apiSettings.defaultApiKeyInfoText: We provide a default API key for your convenience. This key is shared and may have usage limitations.
apiSettings.useMyOwnPrivateKey: Use my own private API key
apiSettings.yourGoogleApiKey: Your Google Generative Language API Key
apiSettings.howToGetApiKey: How to get your API key:
apiSettings.step2: Create a new project or select an existing one
apiSettings.step4: Go to "Credentials" and create an API key
apiSettings.step5: Copy and paste the key here
apiSettings.apiKeyValidText: Your API key is working correctly and ready to use.
apiSettings.apiKeyInvalidText: Please check your API key and ensure the Generative Language API is enabled.
apiSettings.guideline1: The default API key is provided for convenience and testing
apiSettings.guideline2: For production use, we recommend using your own private API key
apiSettings.guideline3: Private keys provide better rate limits and usage control
apiSettings.guideline4: Your API key is stored locally and never sent to our servers
apiSettings.guideline5: Validate your key after any changes to ensure functionality
apiSettings.guideline6: Monitor your API usage in the Google Cloud Console

imageAnalysis.title: Image Analysis
imageAnalysis.errorApiKeyNotFound: API Key not found. Please set it in API Settings.
imageAnalysis.errorParsingAnalysis: Could not parse full analysis. Displaying raw response. Check API Key and prompt.
imageAnalysis.errorAnalyzingImage: Failed to analyze image. Please check your API key and network connection.
imageAnalysis.veoSubtitle: Generate multi-scene video prompts from images
imageAnalysis.storyPlaceholder: Enter your dialog in format: [Character: 'Dialog text here'] [Character: 'Another dialog here']
imageAnalysis.generatedScenesAppearHere: Your generated scenes will appear here...

imageDetector.title: Image Detector & Analyzer
imageDetector.subtitle: Upload images to automatically generate detailed video prompts using AI analysis
imageDetector.errorUploadImageFirst: Please upload a valid image file
imageDetector.errorFileSize: File size must be less than 5MB
imageDetector.uploadAndAnalyzeImage: Upload and analyze an image to see results
imageDetector.aiGeneratesPrompt: AI will generate a detailed video prompt based on the image content
imageDetector.tip1: Use high-quality, well-lit images for better analysis
imageDetector.tip2: Images with clear subjects and minimal clutter work best
imageDetector.tip3: The AI can identify people, objects, settings, and visual styles
imageDetector.tip4: Edit the generated prompt to add specific details or requirements
imageDetector.tip5: Save frequently used characters and objects for quick access
imageDetector.analysisFailed: Failed to analyze image. Please check your API settings.

manualMode.title: Manual Mode
manualMode.errorEnterMessageOrImage: Please enter a message or upload an image.
manualMode.errorFailedToGetResponse: Failed to get response. Please check your API key and network connection.

marketingMode.title: Marketing Mode
marketingMode.productServiceDescriptionPlaceholder: e.g., 'A new AI-powered video editing software that automates scene transitions and adds background music.'
marketingMode.targetAudiencePlaceholder: e.g., 'Small business owners, content creators, marketing agencies'
marketingMode.additionalInstructionsPlaceholder: e.g., 'Keep it concise, use a playful tone, include emojis.'
marketingMode.uploadImageContextHint: Upload an image to provide visual context for content generation.
marketingMode.errorProductServiceDescriptionRequired: Please provide a description of your product/service.
marketingMode.errorFailedToGenerateContent: Failed to generate content. Please check your API key and network connection.
marketingMode.errorParsingMarketingContent: Could not parse marketing content. Displaying raw response. Check API Key and prompt.
marketingMode.headline: Headline

promptBank.title: Prompt Bank
promptBank.promptNamePlaceholder: e.g., SEO Article, Marketing Ad Copy
promptBank.noPromptsAdded: No prompts added yet. Add your first prompt above!
promptBank.noPromptsFound: No prompts found matching your search.
promptBank.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this prompt?

satsetMode.title: Satset Mode
satsetMode.inputDataPlaceholder: Enter article text, social media content, email details, or ideas here...
satsetMode.uploadImageContextHint: Upload an image to provide visual context for content generation.
satsetMode.additionalInstructionsPlaceholder: e.g., 'Keep it under 100 words, use a formal tone.'
satsetMode.errorInputDataOrImageRequired: Please provide input data or an image.
satsetMode.errorFailedToGenerateContent: Failed to generate content. Please check your API key and network connection.
satsetMode.errorParsingGeneratedContent: Could not parse generated content. Displaying raw response. Check API Key and prompt.
